steps.title: Compare the track gauges
steps.content: The Gippsland Railway used broad tracks, while the Mackay Steam Tramway used narrow gauge tracks. The blank must signal this opposition between the two examples.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice A signals a summary, Choice C signals similarity, and Choice D signals an example of the same point. The relationship here is contrast between broad and narrow gauges. The answer is B.
